name: AI Training → Memory Bottleneck
description: Massive GPU deployments for AI training create VRAM/HBM demand surge. Memory companies (Micron, SanDisk, SK Hynix) underpriced relative to coming demand supercycle.
trigger: AI capex announcements, GPU shipment data, memory contract prices

name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
description: Hyperscalers building out AI infrastructure — data centers, power, cooling, networking. Downstream winners beyond the obvious NVDA/AMD.
trigger: Datacenter capex announcements, power grid data, cooling tech news

name: US-China Tech Decoupling
description: Export controls, tariffs, and supply chain shifts creating winners in non-China supply chains. Southeast Asia, India, Mexico manufacturing plays.
trigger: Export control announcements, tariff updates, supply chain relocation news

name: AI-Driven Drug Discovery
description: AI accelerating drug discovery timelines. Companies using AI for protein folding, molecule screening, clinical trial design.
trigger: AI drug pipeline announcements, FDA approvals for AI-discovered drugs, major pharma AI partnerships

name: Energy Transition Acceleration
description: Grid buildout, IRA incentives, and AI power demand converging. Power infrastructure companies underpriced vs. actual buildout needs.
trigger: IRA announcements, grid investment news, electricity demand data

name: Defense Tech Modernization
description: Geopolitical tensions driving defense spending on advanced tech: drones, AI military applications, space, cyber.
trigger: Defense budget announcements, conflict escalation, military tech contracts

name: Commodity Supercycle Reborn
description: AI + energy transition + reshoring = massive raw material demand. Copper, lithium, cobalt, rare earths underpriced.
trigger: Commodity price movements, mining project announcements, EV demand data
